name: curious-stack
description: Content quality skills for AI coding agents

skills.name: ai-slop-detector
skills.description: Analyze text for patterns that signal hollow, AI-generated writing. Returns a tight verdict with the most damning issues.
skills.author: ujjalcal

skills.name: upgrade-skills
skills.description: Self-updater — upgrade curious-stack to latest. Detects global vs vendored install, syncs both, shows what changed.
skills.author: ujjalcal

skills.name: create-skill
skills.description: Helps you write a new agent skill from scratch — builds the prompt, manifest, and registry entry from a plain description.
skills.author: ujjalcal

skills.name: improve-skill
skills.description: Analyze a skill's usage log and evals to suggest concrete improvements to its prompt.
skills.author: ujjalcal

skills.name: eval-skill
skills.description: Run evals on a skill — tests it against sample inputs, judges output quality, reports pass/fail with scores.
skills.author: ujjalcal

skills.name: usage-dashboard
skills.description: View how skills are being used — shows patterns, frequency, trends, and insights from telemetry data.
skills.author: ujjalcal

skills.name: feed-scanner
skills.description: Batch-analyze multiple posts for AI slop. Paste a feed, get a ranked verdict table.
skills.author: ujjalcal

skills.name: auto-eval
skills.description: Generate eval cases from real usage data. Reads telemetry and learnings to find boundary verdicts, re-runs, and outliers — then drafts test cases.
skills.author: ujjalcal

skills.name: claim-checker
skills.description: Detect unsupported claims in any text. Spots stats without sources, causal claims without mechanisms, and authority assertions without credentials.
skills.author: ujjalcal

skills.name: jargon-detector
skills.description: Check if a smart outsider could understand this text. Finds undefined acronyms, in-group assumptions, and abstraction without examples.
skills.author: ujjalcal

skills.name: structure-critic
skills.description: Check if an argument holds together. Finds buried ledes, thesis drift, missing transitions, and section imbalance in longer writing.
skills.author: ujjalcal

skills.name: tone-audit
skills.description: Find the gap between how you think you sound and how you actually sound. Detects inadvertent condescension, defensive writing, and tone shifts.
skills.author: ujjalcal

skills.name: originality-score
skills.description: Check if this has been said a thousand times. Detects commodity takes, consensus restatements, and writing that adds nothing new.
skills.author: ujjalcal

skills.name: full-review
skills.description: Paste text, get a focused content review. Picks the 2-3 most relevant quality axes based on what the text actually needs.
skills.author: ujjalcal
